Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Assign every Promise a caller, awaited settlement, cancellation policy, error path, concurrency budget, and shutdown consequence.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Promise Ownership model · Theory Feed Ts Promise…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: The event loop will safely finish floating Promises before exit.
